body:
### Description

Overseerr allows customizing the "Discover" sliders on the home page (e.g., Trending Movies, Upcoming, Netflix Popular). Managing this via Terraform would allow users to define their UI experience as code and maintain consistent branding/layouts across multiple instances.

### Proposed Solution

Create a new resource, such as `seerr_discover_slider` or a consolidated `seerr_discover_settings`, that interacts with the `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `DELETE /settings/discover` endpoints.

### High-Level Guidance

- The API allows fetching all sliders and updating them.
- If implementing `seerr_discover_slider`, it would represent a single slider block, requiring an `order` and `type` attribute. Handling ordering dynamically in Terraform can be tricky.
- Alternatively, `seerr_discover_settings` could take a list of blocks to ensure the exact ordering of all sliders at once. A consolidated, singleton resource is often safer for ordered lists in Terraform state.
title: Feature Request: Discover Slider Management (seerr_discover_slider)
